标题: Codex for almost everything
原文摘要: A widely discussed post about using OpenAI Codex as a general-purpose coding and automation agent, with debate around security, privacy, and productivity tradeoffs.
热点理由: Codex 成为开发者高频工作流，引发效率、隐私和安全争论

标题: Ask HN: Is Codex really on Par with Claude Code?
原文摘要: HN users compare Codex and Claude Code across code quality, UI generation, task management, CLI usage, and real-world development workflows.
热点理由: 工程师社区正在真实迁移 coding agent，横向比较需求强

标题: Claude Code to be removed from Anthropic's Pro plan?
原文摘要: Discussion around Claude Code usage limits, subscription value, and whether agentic coding tools should move toward API-token based pricing.
热点理由: Claude Code 的订阅限制与成本问题直接影响开发者付费决策

标题: Codex pricing to align with API token usage, instead of per-request limits
原文摘要: HN debate on whether Codex should charge by API token usage instead of opaque plan limits, with users comparing cost predictability across OpenAI and Anthropic.
热点理由: agent 高频调用导致 token 成本成为产品核心矛盾

标题: Claude Code refuses requests or charges extra if your commits mention OpenClaw
原文摘要: A high-engagement HN thread discussing Claude Code behavior, model/vendor incentives, competitive filtering, and the trust boundary of AI coding tools.
热点理由: 涉及 AI 工具是否会受平台商业利益影响，极易引发 HN 争论

标题: What Claude Code's Source Revealed About AI Engineering
原文摘要: A discussion about what the Claude Code source leak revealed, including engineering tradeoffs, memory usage, hidden features, and agent product architecture.
热点理由: 源码泄露天然吸引工程师拆解产品架构和实现质量

标题: The Claude Code Leak
原文摘要: HN thread about the Claude Code source leak, npm packaging mistakes, DMCA responses, and downstream security/social engineering risks.
热点理由: 大厂 AI coding tool 泄露源码，同时涉及安全、版权、工程管理

标题: Claude Code Source Leaked via npm Packaging Error
原文摘要: Security report about Claude Code source exposure through an npm packaging issue, followed by community analysis and concerns over malicious forks.
热点理由: AI 开发工具供应链风险成为开发者社区高关注问题

标题: MCP is dead; long live MCP
原文摘要: A long thread debating whether MCP is a fad or a necessary standard for connecting AI agents to tools, docs, telemetry, and organizational workflows.
热点理由: MCP 是否成为 agent 工具层标准，是 2026 年 AI 开发者核心争议

标题: Anyone else losing tokens to hallucinated MCP tool calls in production?
原文摘要: A small but relevant Ask HN thread about hallucinated MCP tool calls, wasted tokens, and the difficulty of evaluating non-deterministic agent flows in production.
热点理由: 虽然分数不高，但对生产级 agent 的痛点非常精准

标题: Building agents that reach production systems with MCP
原文摘要: Discussion about connecting AI agents to production systems through MCP, with attention to permissions, auditability, and blast-radius control.
热点理由: agent 从 demo 进入生产系统后，权限与审计成为刚需

标题: Compile a paragraph into a workflow that gates agent tools
原文摘要: A proposal for compiling natural-language task instructions into constrained tool-call graphs, limiting what agents can do before MCP tool dispatch.
热点理由: 解决 agent 越权操作和生产事故，是 MCP 生态里的高价值问题

标题: rmBug – audited database access for humans and agents
原文摘要: Show HN-style discussion about audited database access for both developers and AI agents, reflecting a growing need to make agent actions observable and reversible.
热点理由: AI agent 接入数据库后的审计、权限和回滚是强痛点

标题: AI has suddenly become more useful to open-source maintainers
原文摘要: HN discussion about AI coding agents helping open-source maintainers handle issues, refactors, documentation, and long-tail maintenance work.
热点理由: 从“AI 写玩具代码”转向“AI 维护真实项目”，叙事升级明显

标题: Ask HN: AI productivity gains – do you fire devs or build better products?
原文摘要: A debate about whether AI coding productivity should lead to smaller teams, faster product development, or better software quality.
热点理由: 直接触及 AI 替代开发者、组织效率和裁员叙事

标题: Ask HN: Who wants to be fired? (May 2026)
原文摘要: A May 2026 HN discussion where users vent about work, AI-driven workflows, quality engineering fatigue, and non-deterministic agent systems.
热点理由: 反映开发者对 agent 流程质量、不可控性和工作体验的真实疲劳

标题: Show HN: Apfel – The free AI already on your Mac
原文摘要: A Show HN project demonstrating local AI capabilities already available on macOS, with strong HN engagement around on-device AI and Apple ecosystem integration.
热点理由: 本地 AI、隐私和低成本推理是 HN 长期偏好的方向

标题: Show HN: State of the Art of Coding Models, According to My Benchmarks
原文摘要: A benchmark-style Show HN comparing current coding models such as Codex, Claude, Kimi, Qwen, and other frontier or open-weight models.
热点理由: 开发者关心的不是模型榜单，而是真实 coding 任务表现

标题: OpenAI's valuation faces scrutiny amid Codex and Claude Code competition
原文摘要: HN discussion connecting OpenAI's valuation, Codex momentum, frontier model economics, and competitive pressure from Anthropic and other coding agents.
热点理由: HN 会把产品体验、模型能力和公司估值放在一起讨论

标题: Show HN: Unicode Steganography in the context of AI misalignment
原文摘要: A small but technically interesting Show HN demo of Unicode steganography techniques, framed around AI misalignment and hidden prompt manipulation risks.
热点理由: 分数不算高，但非常适合进入 AI 安全和 prompt injection 选题池
